title: coelogyne sulphurea
intro: Coelogyne sulphurea, also known as the golden orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coelogyne sulphurea include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and its potential to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
